topMismatches: Nav height: real 86 sandbox 64 — 22px shorter in sandbox; sandbox uses sticky scroll position

Join: real solid black pill (bg=rgb(34,35,37) white text); sandbox green-outlined ghost (bg transparent, color=rgb(29,191,115)) — opposite styling

Real nav has Fiverr Pro ▾ + Explore ▾ + ⓘ EN + Become a Seller (no currency); sandbox has Fiverr Pro Explore English US$ USD Become a Seller — extra US$ USD currency item, no dropdown chevrons

Sandbox lacks: video element, autoplay loop, pause button bottom-right (real shows ⏸ control at 1450,720)

MAJOR: fontSize 72px (real) vs 48px (sandbox) — sandbox H1 is 24px smaller

MAJOR: fontWeight 280 (real, custom 'Macan' thin) vs 700 (sandbox, system bold) — real uses an ultra-light custom font weight that the sandbox cannot replicate with system fallback. Visual character is completely different (real elegant thin serif, sandbox blocky bold)
H1 width 612 (real, narrow → 2 line wrap 'Our freelancers / will take it from here') vs 720 (sandbox, wider → 'Our freelancers will take it from / here' wraps differently)
H1 height 172 (real, 2 wider lines) vs 105 (sandbox, 2 tighter lines)
